message:
test(mysql): add integration test framework and initial tests

Adds crates/sqlmodel-mysql/tests/mysql_integration.rs with:

Test infrastructure:
- mysql_test_config(): Reads SQLMODEL_TEST_MYSQL_URL env var
- parse_mysql_url(): Parses mysql://user:pass@host:port/db URLs
- parse_host_port(): Handles IPv6 bracket notation
- unique_suffix(): Generates unique test table names
- unwrap_outcome(): Helper for asupersync Outcome handling

Tests skip when SQLMODEL_TEST_MYSQL_URL is not set, allowing CI to run
without MySQL or developers to run against local instances.

The URL parser supports:
- Username with optional password
- Host with optional port (default 3306)
- IPv6 addresses in brackets [::1]:3306
- Database name after /
- Query parameters (stripped)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
